The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Star Atlas Chatter #16 – SAGE Alpha & What’s NEXT!
RahMega posted a video on Star Atlas news.
STAR ATLAS #204 OPAL RAYFAM – How Much Will It Cost & Will you Buy It?
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Altas updates.
Metaverse Nomads #117 Star Atlas w/ Jose
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
Is Star Atlas still a thing?
A video interview with Star Atlas CEO Michael Wagner.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #102
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
#15 | Star Atlas Patch 1.1.1 | SDU Updates | Updates to The Casino
Pathfinder posted a video about Star Atlas news.
The Atlas Brew #85
Star Altas TV posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
STAR ATLAS #205 Amazing New SAGE Updates
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of more Star Atlas updates.
Star Atlas Giving $1.35 Million in Loot to Players of Revolutionary Browser Game on Solana
Star Atlas published an article about their upcoming reward campaign.
Win $150,000 in Weekly Rewards!! (Star Atlas)
Atlas Theory posted a video about the Star Atlas Golden Ticket raffle.
STAR ATLAS #206 BATTLE FOR $300K!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about how to enter a Golden Ticket.
